notebooks.title: Notebook index
notebooks.summary: Start here for the SDK workflow map.

notebooks.title: End-to-end workflow
notebooks.summary: Follow one realistic analysis from loading data to checks, plots, reports, and tool comparison files.

notebooks.title: Public cohort exploration
notebooks.summary: Load public mutation spectra, review mutation counts, and compare samples before fitting signatures.

notebooks.title: Move data between resources
notebooks.summary: Move data between mSigPortal, TCGA/GDC, common table formats, and reports.

notebooks.title: Bring your own spectra
notebooks.summary: Start from your own mutation-count table, check it, fit signatures, and save a report.

notebooks.title: MAF to report
notebooks.summary: Convert variant rows into mutation spectra, fit signatures, review checks, and save results.

notebooks.title: Known-signature quality check
notebooks.summary: Load spectra, fit known signatures, and learn how to read the main quality checks.

notebooks.title: Cohort and panel workflow
notebooks.summary: Fit a cohort, compare sample groups, and review panel/WES limits with report outputs.

notebooks.title: Panel/WES evidence review
notebooks.summary: Review what panel or WES data can and cannot support before reporting signatures.

notebooks.title: Discovery extraction (NMF)
notebooks.summary: Explore patterns in the data without choosing fixed reference signatures first.

notebooks.title: Uncertainty and cutoffs
notebooks.summary: See how signature estimates change when uncertainty and cutoffs are varied.

notebooks.title: Export and reports
notebooks.summary: Save the tables, checks, settings, and report files needed to rerun or review an analysis.

notebooks.title: Multi-tool comparison
notebooks.summary: Compare mSigSDK with SigProfilerAssignment, deconstructSigs, MuSiCal, and R nnls on the same data.

notebooks.title: Experimental sandbox
notebooks.summary: Try early-stage exploratory outputs while keeping their limits visible.
